revision.text:
<tt>{{</tt>[[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]<tt>{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}||''etc.''}}}}</tt><noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt> ''(up to four parameters)''
More than four parameters are ignored, a fourth is displayed as ''etc.''. Blank parameters won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{ [[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}|<tt>|...</tt>}} }}<noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt> up to three parameters for the specified template, a fourth parameter is displayed as <tt>|...</tt>. Blank parameters won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{ [[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}|<tt>|...</tt>}} }}<noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt>
Up to three parameters for the specified template are displayed as placeholders, more are shown as <tt>|...</tt>.
Blank placeholders won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: remove bolding effect--a bit too much, also refactored to move usage up where can be seen, added one perameter (I needed it last week!)
revision.text:
{{{{#if:{{{2|}}}| }}[[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}}| | {{{2}}} }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| | {{{3}}} }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| | {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| | {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| | ... }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| }}}} {{tlx|tlx}} ;Purpose:Mnemonically 'Template list expanded'... after {{TL|Tl}} 'Template list' {{I2}}This template takes another ''templatename'' and some associated pipe-tricked perameters, and aggregates them into an 'example demonstration' of how the ''templatename'' template might be used. If given no additional perameters, it presents the same as the similar {{lts|TL}} template-- a blue link nested in squiggley-braces-- the same as a user would apply the template without perameters. Usage: {{Tlx|Tlx|template name|first parameter|second perameter|...}}
Up to four parameters for the specified template are displayed as placeholders, more parameters are shown as "|''etc.''", for details see the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk]] page. {{-}} ----- {{Interwikitmp-grp|{{PAGENAME}}}} ---- [[Category:Miscellaneous templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{{PAGENAME}}}]] [[ko:틀:Tlx]] [[ru:Template:Tlx]]

If given no additional perameters, it presents the same as the similar {{lts|TL}} template-- a blue link nested in squiggley-braces-- the same as a user would apply the template without perameters. revision.comment: Move documentation to unprotected sub-page so that updates can be made by all users & to reduce transclusion size
fx doc -- /doc doesn't always work interwiki
restore monospace -- was making documentation lie
move </tt> outside the if-then-else flow... back where it was on the 15th
that I notice, none of the other tl* templates have tt or font-family:monospace; remove.
then lets have a span then instead
the name of the template might look better if all can be in lowercase
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/ToePeu.bot|ToePeu.bot]] ([[User talk:ToePeu.bot|talk]]) to last version by Audacity
Changed protection level for "[[Template:Tlx]]": edit-protect too [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
Increase support to template name and ten parameters, per my comment on talk regarding editprotected there by [[User:SMcCandlish|SMcCandlish]], also convert 1 instance of <i>-type html to '' wikitext
If you want it in all lowercase, type it in all lowercase. Others do not want it in all lowercase.
Reverted to revision 197314489 by [[Special:Contributions/Random832|Random832]]; the change broke the code somehow. using [[WP:TWINKLE|TW]]
[[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 252420543 by [[Special:Contributions/TravisTX|TravisTX]] ([[User talk:TravisTX|talk]]) never mind, was a problem elsewhere
changing to {{documentation}} template per request on talk page
Reverting Plastikspork, but using <tt> instead of <span style="font-family:monospace;"> to get the old style, thus can be user styled and does not break in some browsers. See talk page.
Changed protection level of Template:Tlx ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
code layout, ellipsis, removed blankline before Documentation
A dozen parameters is not always enough; this has bit me several times, and it's a trivial fix.

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Tlx]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]; used in system message ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
accept lowercase parameters, track usage of uppercase variants, remove excessive whitespace
Primefac moved page [[Template:Tlx]] to [[Template:Template link expanded]] over redirect: expand name, make it more obvious

<tt>{{</tt>[[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]<tt>{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}||''etc.''}}}}</tt><noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt> ''(up to four parameters)''
More than four parameters are ignored, a fourth is displayed as ''etc.''. Blank parameters won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: remove bolding effect--a bit too much, also refactored to move usage up where can be seen, added one perameter (I needed it last week!)
revision.text:
{{{{#if:{{{2|}}}| }}[[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}}| | {{{2}}} }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| | {{{3}}} }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| | {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| | {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| | ... }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| }}}} {{tlx|tlx}} ;Purpose:Mnemonically 'Template list expanded'... after {{TL|Tl}} 'Template list' {{I2}}This template takes another ''templatename'' and some associated pipe-tricked perameters, and aggregates them into an 'example demonstration' of how the ''templatename'' template might be used. If given no additional perameters, it presents the same as the similar {{lts|TL}} template-- a blue link nested in squiggley-braces-- the same as a user would apply the template without perameters. Usage: {{Tlx|Tlx|template name|first parameter|second perameter|...}}
Up to four parameters for the specified template are displayed as placeholders, more parameters are shown as "|''etc.''", for details see the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk]] page. {{-}} ----- {{Interwikitmp-grp|{{PAGENAME}}}} ---- [[Category:Miscellaneous templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{{PAGENAME}}}]] [[ko:틀:Tlx]] [[ru:Template:Tlx]]

revision.comment: Move documentation to unprotected sub-page so that updates can be made by all users & to reduce transclusion size
fx doc -- /doc doesn't always work interwiki
restore monospace -- was making documentation lie
move </tt> outside the if-then-else flow... back where it was on the 15th
then lets have a span then instead
the name of the template might look better if all can be in lowercase
Increase support to template name and ten parameters, per my comment on talk regarding editprotected there by [[User:SMcCandlish|SMcCandlish]], also convert 1 instance of <i>-type html to '' wikitext
If you want it in all lowercase, type it in all lowercase. Others do not want it in all lowercase.
changing to {{documentation}} template per request on talk page
Reverting Plastikspork, but using <tt> instead of <span style="font-family:monospace;"> to get the old style, thus can be user styled and does not break in some browsers. See talk page.
code layout, ellipsis, removed blankline before Documentation
A dozen parameters is not always enough; this has bit me several times, and it's a trivial fix.
accept lowercase parameters, track usage of uppercase variants, remove excessive whitespace
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:19:03 on [[Template:Template link expanded]]
revision.text:
<tt>{{</tt>[[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]<tt>{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}||''etc.''}}}}</tt><noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt> ''(up to four parameters)''
More than four parameters are ignored, a fourth is displayed as ''etc.''. Blank parameters won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{ [[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}|<tt>|...</tt>}} }}<noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt> up to three parameters for the specified template, a fourth parameter is displayed as <tt>|...</tt>. Blank parameters won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{ [[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}|<tt>|...</tt>}} }}<noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt>

revision.comment: remove bolding effect--a bit too much, also refactored to move usage up where can be seen, added one perameter (I needed it last week!)
revision.text:
{{{{#if:{{{2|}}}| }}[[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}}| | {{{2}}} }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| | {{{3}}} }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| | {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| | {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| | ... }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| }}}} {{tlx|tlx}} ;Purpose:Mnemonically 'Template list expanded'... after {{TL|Tl}} 'Template list' {{I2}}This template takes another ''templatename'' and some associated pipe-tricked perameters, and aggregates them into an 'example demonstration' of how the ''templatename'' template might be used. If given no additional perameters, it presents the same as the similar {{lts|TL}} template-- a blue link nested in squiggley-braces-- the same as a user would apply the template without perameters. Usage: {{Tlx|Tlx|template name|first parameter|second perameter|...}}
Up to four parameters for the specified template are displayed as placeholders, more parameters are shown as "|''etc.''", for details see the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk]] page. {{-}} ----- {{Interwikitmp-grp|{{PAGENAME}}}} ---- [[Category:Miscellaneous templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{{PAGENAME}}}]] [[ko:틀:Tlx]] [[ru:Template:Tlx]]

revision.comment: Move documentation to unprotected sub-page so that updates can be made by all users & to reduce transclusion size
fx doc -- /doc doesn't always work interwiki
restore monospace -- was making documentation lie
move </tt> outside the if-then-else flow... back where it was on the 15th
then lets have a span then instead
the name of the template might look better if all can be in lowercase
Increase support to template name and ten parameters, per my comment on talk regarding editprotected there by [[User:SMcCandlish|SMcCandlish]], also convert 1 instance of <i>-type html to '' wikitext
If you want it in all lowercase, type it in all lowercase. Others do not want it in all lowercase.
changing to {{documentation}} template per request on talk page
Reverting Plastikspork, but using <tt> instead of <span style="font-family:monospace;"> to get the old style, thus can be user styled and does not break in some browsers. See talk page.
code layout, ellipsis, removed blankline before Documentation
A dozen parameters is not always enough; this has bit me several times, and it's a trivial fix.
accept lowercase parameters, track usage of uppercase variants, remove excessive whitespace
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:23:51 on [[Template:Template link expanded]]

revision.comment: Move documentation to unprotected sub-page so that updates can be made by all users & to reduce transclusion size
fx doc -- /doc doesn't always work interwiki
restore monospace -- was making documentation lie
move </tt> outside the if-then-else flow... back where it was on the 15th
then lets have a span then instead
the name of the template might look better if all can be in lowercase
Increase support to template name and ten parameters, per my comment on talk regarding editprotected there by [[User:SMcCandlish|SMcCandlish]], also convert 1 instance of <i>-type html to '' wikitext
If you want it in all lowercase, type it in all lowercase. Others do not want it in all lowercase.
changing to {{documentation}} template per request on talk page
Reverting Plastikspork, but using <tt> instead of <span style="font-family:monospace;"> to get the old style, thus can be user styled and does not break in some browsers. See talk page.
code layout, ellipsis, removed blankline before Documentation
A dozen parameters is not always enough; this has bit me several times, and it's a trivial fix.
accept lowercase parameters, track usage of uppercase variants, remove excessive whitespace
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:24:55 on [[Template:Template link expanded]]
revision.text:
<tt>{{</tt>[[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]<tt>{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}||''etc.''}}}}</tt><noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt> ''(up to four parameters)''
More than four parameters are ignored, a fourth is displayed as ''etc.''. Blank parameters won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{ [[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}|<tt>|...</tt>}} }}<noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt> up to three parameters for the specified template, a fourth parameter is displayed as <tt>|...</tt>. Blank parameters won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{ [[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|Tlx}}}|{{{1|Tlx}}}]]{{ifdef|{{{2|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{2}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{3|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{3}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{4|}}}|<tt>|</tt>{{{4}}}}}{{ifdef|{{{5|}}}|<tt>|...</tt>}} }}<noinclude> ---- Usage: <tt>{{{{PAGENAME}}|template name|first parameter|...}}</tt>
Up to three parameters for the specified template are displayed as placeholders, more are shown as <tt>|...</tt>.
Blank placeholders won't work as expected, use <tt>&nbsp;</tt> or <tt>&#160;</tt> to indicate omitted parameters.
[[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: remove bolding effect--a bit too much, also refactored to move usage up where can be seen, added one perameter (I needed it last week!)
revision.text:
{{{{#if:{{{2|}}}| }}[[{{ns:Template}}:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}}| | {{{2}}} }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| | {{{3}}} }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| | {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| | {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| | ... }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| }}}} {{tlx|tlx}} ;Purpose:Mnemonically 'Template list expanded'... after {{TL|Tl}} 'Template list' {{I2}}This template takes another ''templatename'' and some associated pipe-tricked perameters, and aggregates them into an 'example demonstration' of how the ''templatename'' template might be used. If given no additional perameters, it presents the same as the similar {{lts|TL}} template-- a blue link nested in squiggley-braces-- the same as a user would apply the template without perameters. Usage: {{Tlx|Tlx|template name|first parameter|second perameter|...}}
Up to four parameters for the specified template are displayed as placeholders, more parameters are shown as "|''etc.''", for details see the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk]] page. {{-}} ----- {{Interwikitmp-grp|{{PAGENAME}}}} ---- [[Category:Miscellaneous templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{{PAGENAME}}}]] [[ko:틀:Tlx]] [[ru:Template:Tlx]]

revision.comment: Move documentation to unprotected sub-page so that updates can be made by all users & to reduce transclusion size
fx doc -- /doc doesn't always work interwiki
restore monospace -- was making documentation lie
move </tt> outside the if-then-else flow... back where it was on the 15th
that I notice, none of the other tl* templates have tt or font-family:monospace; remove.
then lets have a span then instead
the name of the template might look better if all can be in lowercase
Increase support to template name and ten parameters, per my comment on talk regarding editprotected there by [[User:SMcCandlish|SMcCandlish]], also convert 1 instance of <i>-type html to '' wikitext
If you want it in all lowercase, type it in all lowercase. Others do not want it in all lowercase.
changing to {{documentation}} template per request on talk page
Reverting Plastikspork, but using <tt> instead of <span style="font-family:monospace;"> to get the old style, thus can be user styled and does not break in some browsers. See talk page.
code layout, ellipsis, removed blankline before Documentation
A dozen parameters is not always enough; this has bit me several times, and it's a trivial fix.
accept lowercase parameters, track usage of uppercase variants, remove excessive whitespace
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
